title: Jwp Hpl808 Lock Food Store Rect 850Ml
features: Patented system of four locking hinges and a resilient silicone seal, ensuring an impeccable 100% airtight and watertight seal
Ideal for preserving freshness in the refrigerator, cupboard or freezer
Made from durable and safe plastics which are BPA-free
Suitable for both microwave reheating and dishwasher usage
Capacity: 850ml and External Measurements: 13.7cm x 10.4cm x 12cm
description: From the manufacturer Lock and Lock - Easy Essentials Food Storage Smart storage made easy. Fresh foods have never had it so good. With a smart mix of container shapes and sizes for a variety of storage needs, Easy Essentials storage containers are perfect for snacks, dry ingredients, sauces, leftovers and more. These food storage containers are ideal for getting the refrigerator and kitchen Organised or for bringing extra ingredients or side dishes on the go. BPA * plastic Wide range of shapes and sizes 4-hinge locking lids or easy twist lids Airtight containers, leakproof and durable for up to 3 million uses Dishwasher safe, microwave safe, and freezer safe Explore Collections - On the Go Meals Enjoy meals wherever you are with storage containers perfect for lunch and meal prep with the On the Go Meals collection. Divided containers with compartments make it especially easy to separate snacks, sides, and entrees. Explore Collections - Colour Mates Keep things Organised with the Colour Mates collection's easy Colour matching system for pairing lids with containers - each container has a Colour dot on the bottom so you know which Colour lid to use. Explore Collections - Specialty The Specialty collection offers an easy way to store specific ingredients, Appetisers, salads and other specific specialty items. Explore Collections - Pantry Choose the Pantry collection for essential containers for pantry Organisation and kitchen Organisation. Airtight containers are great for storing bulk goods - like rice, flour, sugar, and pasta - plus snacks and more.
